name: BUGLIN BULL RESTAURANT AND SPORTS BAR

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --- Plastic cups without handles found in seasonings .--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Napkins on floor in basement.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor on cook line needs to deep cleaned under equipment. - Walls on cook line need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Holes in floor in dish pit.
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
